response.justification: Strong, versatile senior engineer with 15+ years across web, embedded, and systems work, a genuine open-source track record (GISCollective, multiple D libraries), and solid Linux and architecture exposure. However, the role is an executive leadership position requiring German at C1 minimum, and the candidate lists only Basic German — a hard requirement gap. Leadership experience is largely individual-contributor and founder-of-a-small-project rather than formal team/department management, and there is no evidence of UML modeling or IT security/risk/compliance work. A good engineer, but a stretch for a Head of Development role with these specific constraints.
strengths: Deep, broad software experience with a real open-source and Linux background
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform plus extensive teaching/workshop experience showing communication ability
Comfortable picking the right tool across stacks; familiar with architecture, CI/CD, and DevOps
concerns: German listed as Basic, well below the required C1 minimum
Mostly senior IC roles; limited evidence of formal team leadership or technical project management at scale
No mention of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/compliance experience
